tasks.description: Extend useVideoGenerationModalController return type: expose `effectiveAspectRatio` (currently computed at ~line 260 but not returned) and ensure `positionedImages` are available as full GenerationRow[]. Read the controller file, identify the return object, and add `effectiveAspectRatio` to it.

Create ReadOnlyShotImagesGrid wrapper component in VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx. This wraps ShotImagesEditor with readOnly=true, generationMode='batch', preloadedImages from GenerationRow[], all editActions as no-ops, minimal displayOptions (columns=4, isMobile=false, isModeReady=true), empty shotWorkflow. Props: shotId, images (GenerationRow[]), aspectRatio (string), batchVideoFrames (number). Read ShotImagesEditor's props interface first to understand the full shape needed for no-op construction.

Create collapsed summary components in VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx: (1) ShotImagesSummary — horizontal thumbnail strip (reuse pattern from VideoGenerationModalHeader lines 43-58) + image count badge. (2) GenerationSettingsSummary — compact one-liner showing model name, frame count, and truncated prompt (~60 chars). Props for settings summary: VideoTravelSettings or equivalent settings object from the controller.

Build VideoGenerationModalAccordionContent component in VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx. Uses two CollapsibleSection instances in controlled mode (Option A from plan — manage open state locally with useState, render summary outside collapsible when !isOpen, render full content inside CollapsibleContent). Top section: title='Shot Images', defaultOpen from prop, collapsed=ShotImagesSummary, expanded=ReadOnlyShotImagesGrid. Bottom section: title='Generation Settings', defaultOpen from prop, collapsed=GenerationSettingsSummary, expanded=existing VideoGenerationModalFormContent. Props interface includes defaultTopOpen, defaultBottomOpen, all existing form content props, and image grid props (shotId, images, aspectRatio, batchVideoFrames). Do NOT modify the shared CollapsibleSection component.

Update VideoGenerationModal.tsx: (1) Add defaultTopOpen (default false) and defaultBottomOpen (default true) to VideoGenerationModalProps — these defaults are critical per FLAG-001 to preserve behavior for all 3 callers (VideoShotDisplay, GenerationsPaneGallery, TimelineEditor). (2) Replace scrollable content area (lines 82-109) to use VideoGenerationModalAccordionContent instead of directly rendering VideoGenerationModalFormContent. (3) Pass effectiveAspectRatio from controller and positionedImages as full GenerationRow[]. (4) Keep header and footer (Generate button) unchanged.

Update VideoShotDisplay.tsx usage: pass defaultTopOpen={false} and defaultBottomOpen={true} to the VideoGenerationModal invocation at ~line 327-333. This is explicit even though the defaults match, for documentation clarity. Also verify the other two call sites (GenerationsPaneGallery.tsx:262-269 and TimelineEditor.tsx:664-671) compile without changes due to the prop defaults set in T5.

Run TypeScript compilation (npx tsc --noEmit), then run existing Vitest suites that cover changed files: VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx and useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx. Update any breaking tests to match the new component structure (new props, new components, changed render tree). If tests reference VideoGenerationModalFormContent being rendered directly, update to account for the accordion wrapper. Run tests until all pass. Do NOT create new test files.

watch_items: FLAG-001: VideoGenerationModal has 3 callers (VideoShotDisplay, GenerationsPaneGallery, TimelineEditor). The prop defaults defaultTopOpen=false, defaultBottomOpen=true MUST be set on VideoGenerationModalProps so unchanged callers preserve current behavior.
FLAG-002: Existing test suites VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx and useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx will break on the new component structure and must be updated as part of T7.
ShotImagesEditor props are complex (4 sub-interfaces). The ReadOnlyShotImagesGrid wrapper must fully satisfy the type contract with no-ops — read the full interface before constructing.
CollapsibleSection shared component must NOT be modified. Use controlled mode + external summary rendering (Option A).
VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx should stay under ~400 lines (currently 265). Monitor file size as T2/T3/T4 add components.
DEBT WATCH — videogenerationmodal-callers: this is the exact debt item being addressed by FLAG-001 defaults.
DEBT WATCH — videogenerationmodal-validation: this is the exact debt item being addressed by FLAG-002 test updates.
The header (VideoGenerationModalHeader) is kept as-is — thumbnail strip in header is intentionally redundant with the collapsible top section for quick-glance access.

sense_checks.question: Does the controller now return effectiveAspectRatio, and is positionedImages typed as GenerationRow[] (not narrowed to PositionedImagePreview[])?
Does ReadOnlyShotImagesGrid render ShotImagesEditor with readOnly=true, generationMode='batch', and all edit callbacks as no-ops? Are there any TypeScript errors from missing props?
Do the summary components render meaningful data (real thumbnails from images array, real model/frames/prompt from settings) rather than placeholders?
Are both sections independently collapsible? When collapsed, does the summary appear outside the CollapsibleContent? Is the shared CollapsibleSection component unmodified?
Do VideoGenerationModalProps default to defaultTopOpen=false and defaultBottomOpen=true? Is the Generate button footer completely unchanged and always visible?

Do all 3 callers (VideoShotDisplay, GenerationsPaneGallery, TimelineEditor) compile without errors? Do the two callers that don't pass accordion props get correct default behavior (top closed, bottom open)?

Do npx tsc --noEmit, VideoGenerationModalSections.test.tsx, and useVideoGenerationModalController.test.tsx all pass? Were test updates limited to accommodating the new structure (not papering over bugs)?

meta_commentary:
Key execution guidance:

1. **Read ShotImagesEditor's full props interface before T2.** The props type has 4 sub-interfaces (editActions, displayOptions, shotWorkflow, etc.). In readOnly mode, all edit callbacks can be no-ops, but the object must be structurally complete. Grep for the ShotImagesEditor component definition and its props type to understand exactly what's needed.

2. **CollapsibleSection controlled mode pattern (T4).** The plan chose Option A: manage open/closed state with useState(defaultOpen), render the summary component *outside* the CollapsibleSection when !isOpen, and render the full content *inside* CollapsibleContent when isOpen. This avoids modifying the shared component. Look at how CollapsibleSection is used elsewhere in the codebase for the controlled mode pattern.

3. **Props defaults are the FLAG-001 fix.** Setting `defaultBottomOpen = true` as the prop default in VideoGenerationModalProps is the settled decision that protects GenerationsPaneGallery and TimelineEditor callers from regression. This is not optional.

4. **File size budget.** VideoGenerationModalSections.tsx starts at 265 lines and gains 3 new components (ReadOnlyShotImagesGrid, ShotImagesSummary, GenerationSettingsSummary) plus VideoGenerationModalAccordionContent. If approaching 400 lines, consider whether the summaries can be more concise rather than splitting files.

5. **Test updates (T7) are mandatory.** The existing test files directly import and render VideoGenerationModalFormContent and test controller return values. The new accordion wrapper and new return value (effectiveAspectRatio) will require test adjustments. Don't skip this — it's the FLAG-002 resolution.

plan_steps_covered.plan_step_summary: Step 1: Extend controller return type to expose effectiveAspectRatio and full GenerationRow[] images
Step 2: Create ReadOnlyShotImagesGrid wrapper for ShotImagesEditor with readOnly batch mode
Step 3: Create collapsed summary components (ShotImagesSummary, GenerationSettingsSummary)
Step 4: Build accordion section layout with two CollapsibleSection instances in controlled mode
Step 5: Update VideoGenerationModal.tsx to use accordion content and pass new props
Step 6: Update VideoShotDisplay.tsx usage with explicit defaultTopOpen/defaultBottomOpen
Step 7: Visual and functional verification (TypeScript compilation + test suites)

validation.completeness_notes: All 7 plan steps mapped to tasks. FLAG-001 (other callers) addressed via prop defaults in T5 with verification in T6. FLAG-002 (test coverage) addressed in T7. Settled decision on CollapsibleSection Option A (no shared component changes) implemented in T4.
